description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The front facade features a combination of light stone and wood paneling, with a prominent overhang above the entryway. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious wooden deck and a rectangular swimming pool, enclosed by a low wall for privacy. Large glass windows and sliding doors dominate the back, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The side elevations are more subdued, with small vertical window slits and a mix of white and stone surfaces. The property is surrounded by a manicured lawn and paved pathways, emphasizing its contemporary urban character.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with stone and wood accents, large rear windows, and a backyard pool. Clean lines and minimalist design define its urban aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry with stone and wood paneling, a paved path, and a curved stone wall feature.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a long white facade with small vertical windows and a partial view of the pool and deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights large glass windows, a wooden deck, and a rectangular swimming pool within a walled backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the white wall, small vertical windows, and the continuation of the backyard and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows at rear, small vertical slits on sides, minimal front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with overhang, stone and wood cladding, paved approach, and a curved stone wall accent
